CheckTitle: Okta password policies require lowercase characters
Description: **Okta Password Policy lowercase complexity** should require at least one lowercase character in every active policy.
Risk: **Missing lowercase complexity requirements** reduce password search space and create inconsistent protections for users assigned to weaker active policies.

Code.Other: Security > Authentication > Password: edit each active password policy and adjust password settings to the STIG requirement.

Recommendation.Text: **Require at least one lowercase character in every active Okta Password Policy** so all assigned users receive consistent password complexity enforcement.
